baseline.run: 57 (silently no-op due to Pydantic bug; result was Run 49 baseline)
baseline.notes: Run 57 had audio_fusion enabled but the new Event construction in audio_fusion.apply_audio_fusion() was missing 5 required Pydantic fields (job_id, source_file, reel_targets, frame_start, frame_end). The pipeline's try/except caught the validation error and silently fell back to un-augmented events — Run 57's final F1 0.417 / TP 65 / FP 91 was bit-identical to Run 49 baseline. Commit 6d2ef5d propagates the required fields from the source shot_on_target event being promoted. Audio cache for Rush at /tmp/soccer-pipeline/audio_cache/3192fa07*.npz is already built, so Run 59 audio scoring is ~5s lookup not 20min recompute.

targets.notes: Mode B (shot+celebration → goal promotion) and Mode C (audio_celebration_score on goals). Validation criteria: (a) audio_fusion.summary log fires with non-zero stats this time; (b) refinement_verdicts.jsonl analog (audio_fusion stats in pipeline log) shows shots_examined > 0 and either confirmed_with_audio > 0 or shots_promoted > 0; (c) F1 holds baseline 0.417 (no precision filter applied so should not regress). Modest expected impact on goal recall since only ~50% of Rush goals had audio peaks.

audio_fusion_enabled.reason: Per-job opt-in. Audio scores cached for Rush — no recompute.

notes: Run #59 (commit 6d2ef5d): retry of Run 57 after audio_fusion.apply_audio_fusion bug fix. Worker restarted. Pre-flight pending — should fire audio_fusion.summary log line at end of run.
